overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire exploring a Hellenistic temple complex at night. The character approaches a classical columned temple with flanking statues, enters to view an interior cult statue illuminated by candles, then exits to explore the surrounding mosaic courtyard and colonnaded grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple approach with garden paths and hedges

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a stone path toward the illuminated classical temple

entered.detail: large stone temple with triangular pediment and columns at the end of the path
cobblestone walkway leading to the temple entrance
trimmed green hedges lining both sides of the approach path
tall trees with dense canopies flanking the temple approach
burning torches on stands providing warm illumination along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone path toward a grand classical temple at night. The approach is lined with trimmed hedges and Mediterranean trees, with burning torches providing warm light against the cool night sky. The temple with its columns and pediment dominates the view ahead.

events.description: character passes through the columned entrance into the temple interior

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs toward the temple entrance, passing between large statues

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
monumental stone statues flanking the staircase on both sides
tall fluted columns supporting the temple portico
dark doorway leading into the temple interior

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide temple stairs, passing between monumental statues on either side. The camera moves up the steps toward the columned portico, then transitions into the darker interior space through the grand entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple sanctuary with cult statue and offerings

events.description: entering the dimly lit interior illuminated by candles and warm artificial light
character turns and exits the temple back to the exterior courtyard

agents.ego_description: approaching the central statue inside the temple, pausing to observe it, then turning to exit

entered.detail: large robed statue on a pedestal, the central cult image of the temple
enclosed sanctuary space with decorated walls and ceiling
lit candles arranged around the base of the statue providing warm illumination
decorated ceiling with square recessed panels

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple sanctuary, the character approaches a large robed statue illuminated by candles. The interior features a coffered ceiling and marble floors. After observing the statue, the character turns and exits back to the exterior, transitioning from the dim interior to the moonlit courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with mosaic pavement and colonnades

agents.ego_description: walking around the temple exterior across mosaic pavements and along colonnaded pathways

entered.detail: open courtyard with intricate geometric mosaic patterns on the pavement
long covered walkway with rows of columns extending along the right side
smaller classical structures surrounding the main temple complex

segments.scene_description: Having exited the temple, the character explores the surrounding courtyard with its detailed mosaic pavement. The camera moves along pathways bordered by colonnades and garden hedges, with the main temple now visible to the left and smaller classical buildings ahead. The scene is lit by moonlight and scattered torches as the character continues exploring the complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a torch-lit approach toward a grand classical temple, moving through its sacred interior before opening into a moonlit courtyard. It begins along a cobblestone path lined with trimmed hedges and Mediterranean trees, where warm torchlight contrasts with the cool night sky as the temple dominates the horizon. The camera then ascends the wide stairs between monumental statues and passes through the columned portico into the dim sanctuary, where a robed statue is illuminated by flickering candles beneath a coffered ceiling. After observing the idol, the view shifts back toward the exterior, transitioning from the shadows of the interior to the bright moonlight of the surrounding grounds. The scene finally expands across detailed mosaic pavements and colonnaded pathways, moving past garden hedges toward smaller classical buildings as the main temple recedes to the left.
